This directory vendors the upstream unxip command-line tool source used to build the macOS bundled helper.

Upstream repository: https://github.com/saagarjha/unxip
Upstream tree: 6c3990517fcc4c1db6952fccf4c562fb14097601
Vendored source file: unxip.swift (blob 71333cf98c998c7ebb75590e5a21b8db05f2c358)
